name: log_activity
description: Log a new exercise or physical activity for the authenticated user. You must specify an activity ID or name, the start time, and the duration. Optionally include distance and calories. Common activity IDs: 90013 (Walking), 90009 (Running), 90001 (Biking), 15000 (Yoga), 2130 (Weightlifting), 90024 (Swimming). Use the activityName parameter for free-text activity names if you do not know the ID.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: The Fitbit activity type ID. Required if activityName is not provided.

parameters.name: activityName
parameters.description: Free-text name of the activity. Required if activityId is not provided.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: The start time of the activity in HH:mm format (24-hour).

parameters.name: durationMillis
parameters.description: Duration of the activity in milliseconds.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date the activity was performed, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: distance
parameters.description: Distance covered during the activity, in the unit specified by distanceUnit.

parameters.name: distanceUnit
parameters.description: Unit for distance. One of: 'Kilometer', 'Mile'. Defaults to user's locale setting.

parameters.name: manualCalories
parameters.description: Manually specified calories burned. Overrides Fitbit's estimate.
